creator: support@fortuitous.com
text:
Please change the consultants listing for Fortuitous.com to the following:
Fortuitous Technologies provides Performance Tuning, Capacity Planning, System Design, Network Design and security services for FreeBSD, Linux, and Unix systems worldwide. We cover Cloud, Grid, and Multi-tiered systems of all types. Contact us at http://Fortuitous.com for further information.
